# Java Logging Conventions
# Scope: ALL generated code (shared across API / UI / Mobile test types)

## Annotation

Every class that emits any log output must be annotated `@Slf4j` (Lombok):

```java
@Slf4j
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class BddGenerator {
    // log field is auto-generated by @Slf4j
}
```

---

## Message Format

Every log message must start with `[ClassName]` — enables fast `grep` in production:

```java
log.info ("[BddGenerator] Generating scenarios for PR '{}' ({})", prId, testType);
log.warn ("[BddGenerator] AI unavailable — falling back to template mode");
log.error("[BddGenerator] Generation failed for PR '{}': {}", prId, e.getMessage(), e);
log.debug("[BddGenerator] Prompt ({} chars): {}", prompt.length(), prompt);
```

### Level guide

| Level | When to use |
|-------|------------|
| `log.info` | Key lifecycle events: started, completed, published, received |
| `log.warn` | Degraded but operational: fallback activated, retry attempted |
| `log.error` | Failure requiring attention: always include the exception as last arg |
| `log.debug` | Verbose internal state: raw messages, prompt content, parsed data |

---

## Exception Logging

Always pass the exception as the **last argument** — SLF4J renders the full stack trace:

```java
// ✅ Correct
log.error("[MyService] Processing failed for PR '{}': {}", prId, e.getMessage(), e);

// ❌ Missing stack trace — impossible to debug in production
log.error("[MyService] Processing failed: {}", e.getMessage());
```

---

## What NEVER to Log

```java
// ❌ NEVER log credentials, tokens, or secrets at any level
log.info("[GitHubService] Using token: {}", token);                // FORBIDDEN
log.debug("[AiClient] Authorization header: Bearer {}", apiKey);  // FORBIDDEN

// ✅ Log length or presence — never the value
log.info("[GitHubService] Token resolved ({} chars)", token.length());
log.info("[AiClient] API key configured: {}", !apiKey.isBlank());
```

```java
// ❌ NEVER log full diff content at INFO or above (may contain secrets)
log.info("[PRService] Diff: {}", rawDiff);  // FORBIDDEN

// ✅ Log size only at INFO; full content only at DEBUG
log.info ("[PRService] Diff received ({} bytes)", rawDiff.length());
log.debug("[PRService] Raw diff content: {}", rawDiff);
```
